INSERT INTO cleaner_jobs (
  completedJobId, bookingId, cleanerProfileId, cleanerName, teamName, teamId,
  jobDate, serviceDateTime, customerName, customerPhone, jobAddress,
  serviceType, bookingStatus, customerNotes, staffNotes,
  jobRevenue, payPercent, basePay, photoSubmitted, flagged
) VALUES (
  0, 999999, 3, 'GoGreen', 'GoGreen', 20526,
  '2026-03-20', '2026-03-20T14:00:00Z', 'Jane Sample', '+13029816191', '1234 Test Lane NW, Washington DC 20001',
  '2 Bedroom, 1 Bathroom', 'assigned', 'Please use green products only.', NULL,
  '185.00', '68', '125.80', 0, 0
);

INSERT INTO rating_sms_pending (
  completedJobId, cleanerJobId, customerPhone, customerFirstName, cleanerName, jobDate, status
)
SELECT
  0,
  LAST_INSERT_ID(),
  '+13029816191',
  'Jane',
  'GoGreen',
  '2026-03-20',
  'pending';
